name: Nepali Chatpate
description: Muri or chatpate is popular street food in Nepal & India, made using puffed rice, veggies; light, spicy an crunchy in texture

name: Tass
description: Tass is a popular Nepali meat dish that originated in Chitwan, Southern Nepal. boneless lamb slices are marinated in Nepali herbs and spices, slowly cooked in oil on low heat in a large near-flat concave thick-bottomed pan called tawa, resulting in an assertively spiced crispy lamb preparation

name: Sandeko

name: Panipuri (3 pieces)
description: Pani Puri is a popular street food in India, where crisp fried dough balls (puri) are stuffed with potatoes, sprouts, spicy tangy water or sweet chutney
